titleStmt.title: SII 11.104: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 104. (B.K. No. 71 of 1927-28). DA·πÄBA·∏∂, MUNDARGI PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB FIXED OVER A GUTTER NEAR THE OLD chƒÅva·∏çi.

summary.p: This damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Trail≈çkyamalladƒìva who, on palaeographic grounds of the record must be S≈çmƒì≈õvara I and gives the pra≈õasti of his subordinate (name lost) ‚Äòwho possessed the five great sounds‚Äô.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
